fields.name: UNKNOWN_FIELD
fields.description: Placeholder for unset or unrecognized field values.

fields.name: ID
fields.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the entity.

fields.name: AS_OF
fields.description: The timestamp at which this entity's state is observed.

fields.name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
fields.description: The date on which an event takes effect. Used as a pivot field for position aggregation.

fields.name: STRATEGY
fields.description: The investment strategy associated with this position or transaction.

fields.name: SECURITY
fields.description: The full security object associated with this position or transaction.

fields.name: CASH_IMPACT_SECURITY
fields.description: The cash security representing the monetary impact of a transaction (e.g. USD for a bond purchase).

fields.name: PORTFOLIO
fields.description: The full portfolio object associated with this position or transaction.

fields.name: PORTFOLIO_ID
fields.description: The UUID of the portfolio.

fields.name: PRICE
fields.description: The price object associated with this position or transaction.

fields.name: PRICE_ID
fields.description: The UUID of the price.

fields.name: IS_CANCELLED
fields.description: Whether the transaction has been cancelled.

fields.name: POSITION_STATUS
fields.description: The status of the position (e.g. INTENDED, EXECUTED, SETTLED).

fields.name: TRADE_DATE
fields.description: The date on which a trade was executed (spot date).

fields.name: SETTLEMENT_DATE
fields.description: The date on which a trade settles (exchange of cash and securities).

fields.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE
fields.description: The type of transaction (BUY, SELL, DEPOSIT, WITHDRAWAL, MATURATION, etc.).

fields.name: TAX_LOT_OPEN_DATE
fields.description: The date a tax lot was opened (position acquired).

fields.name: TAX_LOT_CLOSE_DATE
fields.description: The date a tax lot was closed (position disposed).

fields.name: ASSET_CLASS
fields.description: The asset class of the security (e.g. Fixed Income, Equity, Cash).

fields.name: PRODUCT_CLASS
fields.description: The product class of the security (e.g. Bond, CashEquity).

fields.name: PRODUCT_TYPE
fields.description: The specific product type (e.g. BILL, NOTE, BOND). Derived from the security's tenor.

fields.name: SECURITY_ID
fields.description: The UUID of the security.

fields.name: IDENTIFIER
fields.description: The security's market identifier (e.g. CUSIP, ISIN, ticker).

fields.name: TENOR
fields.description: The original tenor (term) of the security, calculated as maturity date minus issue date.

fields.name: MATURITY_DATE
fields.description: The date on which the principal of a bond is repaid.

fields.name: ADJUSTED_TENOR
fields.description: The remaining tenor of the security, calculated as maturity date minus today.

fields.name: ISSUE_DATE
fields.description: The date on which the security was originally issued.

fields.name: PORTFOLIO_NAME
fields.description: The human-readable name of the portfolio.

fields.name: SECURITY_DESCRIPTION
fields.description: The human-readable description of the security.

fields.name: SECURITY_ISSUER_NAME
fields.description: The name of the entity that issued the security (e.g. US Government, Apple Inc.).
